mentions.note: Long-term turnaround story under CEO Charlie Scharf; aggressive buyback program supports stock price appreciation; not primarily an earnings story.
Bank hiring AWS technologists to unlock hidden savings via software and automation; represents software buyer thesis winning in market rotation.
Best positioned bank to benefit from AI efficiency gains. Owned in Trust for AI-driven cost reduction.
